title: Extend DataSet for frozen reference-dataset provenance
description:
## Summary
Extend `DataSet` with the minimum metadata needed to distinguish frozen reference datasets from generic dataset artifacts.

## Deliverables
- Add provenance/build-context metadata for frozen reference datasets.
- Preserve `DataSet` as a generic artifact type.
- Keep active-reference selection on `Score` rather than moving it onto `DataSet`.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: add minimal optional DataSet metadata fields for frozen reference provenance/build context while preserving DataSet genericity and keeping active selection pointers on Score.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented DataSet frozen-reference provenance fields.

Schema additions on DataSet:
- isReferenceFrozen
- referenceRole
- provenance
- buildContext
- frozenAt

This keeps DataSet generic while allowing deterministic/frozen reference artifacts to be explicitly identified and traced to build context. Active dataset selection remains on Score (referenceDataSetId).

Runtime/API updates:
- Extended dashboard DataSet create/update wrapper typings in dashboard/utils/amplify-client.ts.
- Extended Python DataSet model fields in plexus/dashboard/api/models/data_set.py.

Validation: python -m py_compile passed for modified Python modules.
